title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 167.113 - Compliance with federal laws relating to pupil rights required
text:
167.113.  Compliance with federal laws relating to pupil rights required. — The state of Missouri shall comply with all the provisions of the federal law relating to the protection of pupil rights, as contained in Section 1232h(b) of Title 20 United States Code.
(L. 1983 H.B. 815 § 162.022)
